reviews.review_description:
I spent an hour on the treadmill today and felt like I was in 2001: A Space Odyssey. Very immersive and pretty comfortable, I really enjoy that you can set the speed to the speed of your treadmill to get that 1:1 movement ratio.

Highly recommend if you're looking for a nice distraction during your exercise.

The graphics are really nice, the interface and the avatars, I think the app does what it says, the middle option next to treadmill isn't working for me, the exercises work but when I change to another one it doesn't work, it has to finish the previous animation to show the next one you are typing for 20secs, except this, I think it's a good app.
I really like the space one!  Setting your speed is great.  Hoping to see in the future a watch on my wrist showing the time and how far I went.
